commands.review_summary:
Updates docs/SETUP.md to remove the account/gateway-token prerequisite and describe the current local WSL setup, Advanced setup, capabilities, gateway setup, permissions, and completion flow.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a documentation PR rather than a runtime bug. Source inspection of the setup UI and deep-link routing provides the relevant behavior check.

target.title: Fix setup guide prerequisites
target.body:
## Summary
- remove the misleading OpenClaw account/gateway token hard prerequisite from the setup guide
- clarify that Companion can install a dedicated local WSL gateway on first launch
- update the onboarding section to point existing/remote/manual gateway users to Advanced setup and the Connections tab

Fixes #639.

## Validation
- `OPENCLAW_REPO_ROOT=C:\oc639 .\build.ps1`
- `dotnet test .\tests\OpenClaw.Shared.Tests\OpenClaw.Shared.Tests.csproj --no-restore`
- `dotnet test .\tests\OpenClaw.Tray.Tests\OpenClaw.Tray.Tests.csproj --no-restore`
target.author: ranjeshj
